author: bkindler
description: Open embedded images fullscreen with double-click. Pinch to zoom, two-finger swipe to pan. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Björn Kindler
manifest.description: Open embedded images fullscreen with double-click. Pinch to zoom, two-finger swipe to pan.
manifest.name: ImageFull

name: ImageFull

releases.author: bkindler
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Double-click / double-tap embedded images → fullscreen overlay
- Pinch (touch + trackpad) → zoom up to 10×
- Two-finger swipe / trackpad swipe → shift visible image section
- Mouse drag when zoomed → pan
- Double-click overlay → close · Esc · `0` resets zoom
- Works in reading view, live preview, desktop and mobile
